user.title: Sigenergy Cloud
user.description: Choose your region and authentication method.

key.title: App Key Authentication
key.description: Enter your App Key and App Secret from the Sigenergy Developer Portal.

system.title: Installation ID
system.description: Enter your Installation ID from the Sigenergy Developer Portal ({portal_url}).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Sigenergy Cloud credentials have expired. Please reauthenticate.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your email, password and region — and make sure password login is enabled for this account. (Details: {error_detail})
error.user_not_found: This email is not registered in the selected region. Please check your email address or switch to the region where your Sigenergy account was created.
error.wrong_password: The password is incorrect. Please try again — note that passwords are case-sensitive.
error.rate_limited: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Sigenergy Cloud. Please check your internet connection and try again. (Details: {error_detail})
error.unknown: Something went wrong during login. Please try again. (Details: {error_detail})
